title: palicourea cornigera
intro: Palicourea cornigera, also known as the ram-horned palicourea or horned palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as treating fever, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Palicourea cornigera is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
